name: Siopow (Steamed Dumplings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the wrapper dough by boiling it. Remove from heat and stir in flour until a ball forms.
2. Divide into balls, roll each to about 1/4 inch thickness.
3. Spoon mixture onto wrappers, fold and seal.
4. Arrange in steamer and steam for 30 minutes.
Additional notes:
These can be made with thicker wrappers (like those sold by street vendors) up to 1 inch thick. The filling can include leftover meat and vegetables such as mushrooms or celery.
